div.style: background: linear-gradient(135deg, #875A7B 0%, #6B3F6B 50%, #4C2B5A 100%); border-radius: 10px; margin-bottom: 20px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(135, 90, 123, 0.45), 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); border: 2px solid #A06A96; font-family: sans-serif;
background: rgba(0,0,0,0.25); padding: 8px 20px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);

span.style: display: inline-block; width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; background: #FFD700; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255,215,0,0.3);
font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #FFD700;
margin-left: auto; background: #FFD700; color: #4C2B5A; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 20px;

div.style: font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); margin-bottom: 6px;
width: 1px; height: 56px; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent, rgba(255,255,255,0.3), transparent); margin: 0 32px;
